arts.ttl: Crystal Palace fear Chelsea will recall Trevoh Chalobah from loan as Olivier Glasner confirms latest
arts.sum: Chelsea have option to bring back Chalobah in January as they consider ways to ease their defensive shortage

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds to include in-demand teenager in package to sign Bournemouth's Antoine Semenyo?
arts.sum: Liverpool will reportedly consider using an in-demand teenager as part of a transfer package to sign Bournemouth attacker Antoine Semenyo.

arts.ttl: Chelsea handed Noni Madueke boost for Bournemouth as Enzo Maresca makes Reece James admission
arts.sum: "For sure, full-backs being used in that way, up and down, for them, it is probably physically using more energy," Maresca said on James' position. Romeo Lavia and Reece James, meanwhile, made their comebacks from injury against Morecambe with both playing 45 minutes.

arts.ttl: 'Versatile' Renato Veiga and Cole Palmer warning as Chelsea chase January reinforcements
arts.sum: Chelsea have enjoyed a fine start to life under new boss Enzo Maresca, but recent performances have put pressure on the team to not let their Champions League berth fall to Newcastle United or Manchester City - and football.london readers in our comments section think that there are some affordable options open to the club to help them do so. Currently on loan at Crystal Palace, Chalobah was left out of their FA Cup game against Stockport County, with rumours that the Blues want to bring him back to Stamford Bridge to shore up a defence troubled by injury.

arts.ttl: Chelsea full squad revealed vs Bournemouth as nine miss out and new signing decision made
arts.sum: Here, football.london predicts the full 20-man squad Maresca will name for Bournemouth. Bournemouth themselves have problems in attack but are looking to move level on points with Chelsea with a win.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca can build dream Chelsea attack after £172m transfer window
arts.sum: football.london understands that t he Blues have been in contact with Bayern Munich over a potential deal for the 19-year-old forward. In June, football.london understood that the Blues were in talks with Aston Villa over a potential deal for the 21-year-old striker, but his wage demands proved to be an issue.

arts.ttl: Nkunku Chelsea struggles comes down to Palmer amid Bayern Munich transfer talks
arts.sum: Pochettino spoke to reporters after the match and said how he was hoping the injury was not too serious - but it ended up seeing the former RB Leipzig attacker miss over four months of action, where he eventually made his debut for the Blues on December 19 in the Carabao Cup quarter-final victory over Newcastle United at Stamford Bridge. Chelsea were taking on Borussia Dortmund in their fifth and final pre-season friendly of the club's tour of the United States.

arts.ttl: Chelsea could still make January move involving 'standout' midfielder at Enzo Maresca's request, nobody expected it 'until now' - journalist
arts.sum: Chelsea’s January transfer plans are changing seemingly by the minute at the moment as they continue to be linked with new signings. It is actually...

arts.ttl: One in, one out? Chelsea set £65m asking price for big-name player
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly ready to ask for £65million to let Christopher Nkunku go, while they’ve also asked Bayern Munich about Mathys Tel. Nkunku has struggled for regular playing time at Stamford Bridge, but he remains a big name and he’s often done well and made an impact when he has got onto the pitch for […] The post One in, one out? Chelsea set £65m asking price for big-name player appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Report: How much Chelsea value Christopher Nkunku at as Bayern Munich attempt to sign him
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku only joined Chelsea from RB Leipzig in the summer of 2023, but there’s now widespread speculation about him potentially leaving Stamford Bridge. Christopher...
